title: zygogynum amplexicaule subsp. luteum
intro: Zygogynum amplexicaule subsp. luteum is a plant species commonly known as the yellow-fruited zygogynum, belonging to the family Olacaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Zygogynum amplexicaule subsp. luteum are often utilized in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its therapeutic effects. By harnessing the plant's medicinal properties through herbal preparations, individuals may experience improved overall well-being and relief from various health issues.
